content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with Pharma +2.69%, Auto +0.96%, Metals +1.08%, Bank Nifty +0.68%, and US markets strong overnight. VIX cooling -2.68% to 17.43 supports risk-on. My book is broadly green with multiple positions in profit; focus is on trailing SLs to lock gains rather than chase fresh extended breakouts at 13:43.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.5%, CMP 1049.70, current SL 1030. Holding above VWAP 1052 with intact uptrend post Q4 beat. Tightening SL marginally to 1032 (1.7% below CMP, locks ~4.9% gain). Target unchanged at 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.0%, CMP 1729.20 (off intraday high 1751). Current SL 1710 just below entry 1700. Tightening to 1715 to lock +0.9% min gain; SL sits 0.8% below CMP — wait, that's tight. Adjust: 1715 is 0.83% below CMP, slightly under the 1% trail-gap floor. Revising mentally — leaving at current 1710 is cleaner. Actually, keeping discipline: HOLD is better than churning. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Superseding above MODIFY noise — keeping current SL 1030 (1.78% below CMP 1049.70). Within trail-gap discipline; position intact, Q4 momentum strong. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 124.14 vs entry 125.10. SL 119 (-4.1% from CMP) intact. Gold thesis (geopolitics, hedge) still valid. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "+2.0%, CMP 1729.20. Current SL 1710 sits 1.1% below CMP — already at trail-gap floor. Faded from intraday high 1751 but holding above 1718. Keeping SL 1710 (locks small gain, breakeven+). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%, CMP 4622.60. Current SL 4600 sits only 0.5% below CMP — TOO TIGHT, will get whipsawed on any normal pullback. Loosening SL slightly to 4570 (1.13% below CMP, just under entry 4575) — gives room while still capping risk. Defence sector bid intact, new CMD, Rs 2.54 lakh cr order book."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%, CMP 7031, current SL 6960 (1.0% below CMP). At trail-gap floor. Q4 print blew out estimates (PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875 bps), Geojit target 8500. Keeping SL same, target same — this is effectively a HOLD; cancel modify."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "reasoning": "Override: SL 6960 unchanged, target 7400 unchanged. No-op MODIFY avoidance — emitting HOLD. Strong fundamental tailwind, near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, CMP 847. Current SL 832 (1.8% below CMP). Lifting SL to entry 838 (1.06% below CMP, locks breakeven). Q4 board pending — binary risk; tightening to breakeven is the right pre-event hedge per binary-event discipline. Sector basket move, vulnerable to mean reversion."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 365.95 (off intraday high 372.50). SL 362 intact (1.1% below CMP). Q4 strong (PAT +30%, AUM +32%), MOSL/MS Buy. Letting it work; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, CMP 821.80 vs entry 820. SL 818 (0.5% below CMP) — tight but post-Q4 the stock faded from 843; FMCG defensive. Leaving as-is to avoid micro-adjust churn. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9%, CMP 1283. SL 1265 (1.4% below CMP), target 1330. Within trail-gap discipline. IT sector weak overall; not adding more to this risk. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, CMP 3056.60. SL 2950 (3.5% below CMP), target 3225. Defence basket strong; stock recovered intraday from 2926 to 3074 high. SL gives normal volatility room. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 802.60. SL 790 (1.6% below CMP), target 855. Q4 record print, 46.5% EBITDA margin, +9.8% on day. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY LIMIT @ 133.50, 600 qty, placed 536 min ago. CMP 138.53 — well above limit; order will not fill. After 13:43 with MIS auto-square-off mandate at 3:10, opening a new MIS chase at 138 leaves only ~85 minutes — not enough time for the breakout to play. Not stacking a second order; existing limit is harmless. Will let it expire. No new action."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Stock +9.91% on day, near 52w high after +92% YTD. Already extended; chasing CNC entry at 138 with full position size adds correlated momentum risk to a book heavy in extended names. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "SL 1030 sits 1.8% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline; Q4 momentum intact."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 119.00, "reasoning": "Hedge/diversifier; small drawdown within tolerance."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1710.00, "reasoning": "SL already 1.1% below CMP; faded from high but thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 4570.00, "reasoning": "Loosening from 4600 to 4570 — current SL too tight (0.5% below CMP would whipsaw); 4570 gives 1.13% room. NOTE: This loosens SL — if guardrail rejects, accept current 4600."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor (1.0% below CMP); strong fundamentals."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 838.00, "reasoning": "Lifting SL to entry 838 — Q4 board pending = binary event; lock to breakeven per binary-event discipline."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 362.00, "reasoning": "SL 1.1% below CMP; Q4 print strong, momentum intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 818.00, "reasoning": "Tight but consistent with FMCG low vol; avoid micro-adjust churn."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1265.00, "reasoning": "SL within trail-gap; IT sector weak — not adding risk."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2950.00, "reasoning": "Wider SL appropriate for defence basket volatility."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 790.00, "reasoning": "SL 1.6% below CMP; Q4 record, give it time to consolidate gap."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 will not fill (CMP 138.53). Letting it expire EOD rather than chasing or canceling — no harm sitting open. M&M, SRF, AUROPHARMA, BIOCON noted but not entering: book already at 54% deployed with multiple post-Q4 momentum names (HAL, NAVINFLUOR, COFORGE, CAMS, ABCAPITAL, MARICO, PNBHOUSING) — adding more breakout-on-earnings names is correlation stacking. Watching for pullback entries tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is broadly green: 8 of 11 names in profit, total unrealized +₹8,586. Capital deployed 54%, room for 1-2 more positions but only on quality pullbacks, not chasing extended breakouts at 13:43. Sector spread reasonable: Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), Capital Goods/Defence (HAL, TITAGARH, GRSE), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO), Services (ADANIPORTS), Gold (GOLDBEES). Defence cluster (HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE) is ~15% — at watch limit, no more defence adds. Rolling 5d win rate 14% is concerning — discipline today is to manage existing winners well, not force new entries."
}
